creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg is not supposed to do that, finer grain packages (aka changes in the ports tree are the way to this, with for example subpackages) or we have already in pkg todo list the plan to support some kind of alternative framework which could also help here.

In anycase this is not a pkg bug and what pkg can to do help in the situation is in our TODO list. Thank you for reporting!
